steps.title: Introduce the list
steps.content: The sentence has a complete clause before the blank: the poem contains three signature elements of Brooks's poetic style. What follows is the list of those three elements.

steps.title: Choose list punctuation
steps.content: A creates a fragment after the period, B uses a semicolon before a noun phrase instead of an independent clause, and D uses only a comma to introduce the list. A colon after the complete clause correctly introduces the three elements. The answer is C.
